017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.converter;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
020
021import java.util.*;
022
023import org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.*;
024
025/**
026 * A list of {@link RestConverter} objects.
027 *
028 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
029 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/Converters">Converters</a>
030 * </ul>
031 */
032public class RestConverterList {
033
034   /**
035    * Builder class.
036    */
037   public static class Builder {
038
039      private final BeanStore beanStore;
040      List<BeanInstantiator.Builder<RestConverter>> entries;
041
042      /**
043       * Create an empty builder.
044       *
045       * @param beanStore The bean store to use for creating beans.
046       */
047      protected Builder(BeanStore beanStore) {
048         this.beanStore = beanStore;
049         this.entries = list();
050      }
051
052      /**
053       * Returns the bean store used by this builder.
054       *
055       * @return The bean store used by this builder.
056       */
057      public BeanStore beanStore() {
058         return beanStore;
059      }
060
061      /**
062       * Appends the specified rest converter classes to the list.
063       *
064       * @param values The values to add.
065       * @return This object.
066       */
067      @SuppressWarnings({
068         "unchecked" // Varargs with generics require unchecked cast
069      })
070      public Builder append(Class<? extends RestConverter>...values) {
071         for (var v : values)
072            entries.add(BeanInstantiator.of(RestConverter.class, beanStore).type(v));
073         return this;
074      }
075
076      /**
077       * Appends the specified rest converter objects to the list.
078       *
079       * @param values The values to add.
080       * @return This object.
081       */
082      public Builder append(RestConverter...values) {
083         for (var v : values)
084            entries.add(BeanInstantiator.of(RestConverter.class, beanStore).impl(v));
085         return this;
086      }
087
088      /**
089       * Builds the list.
090       *
091       * @return A new {@link RestConverterList}.
092       */
093      public RestConverterList build() {
094         return new RestConverterList(this);
095      }
096   }
097
098   /**
099    * Static creator.
100    *
101    * @param beanStore The bean store to use for creating beans.
102    * @return A new builder for this object.
103    */
104   public static Builder create(BeanStore beanStore) {
105      return new Builder(beanStore);
106   }
107
108   private final RestConverter[] entries;
109
110   /**
111    * Constructor.
112    *
113    * @param builder The builder containing the contents for this list.
114    */
115   protected RestConverterList(Builder builder) {
116      // @formatter:off
117      entries =
118         builder
119            .entries
120            .stream()
121            .map(BeanInstantiator.Builder::run)
122            .toArray(RestConverter[]::new);
123      // @formatter:on
124   }
125
126   /**
127    * Returns the contents of this list as a {@link RestConverter} array.
128    *
129    * @return The contents of this list as a {@link RestConverter} array.
130    */
131   public RestConverter[] asArray() {
132      return entries;
133   }
134}
